creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 162557
patch to take maintainership

Hello,

i will took the maintainership of this port. While there i recreated the patches with "make makepatch" as portlint wishes.

I asked the current maintainer if i could take the maintainership and he answered: 

> Yeah sure; I haven't seriously used FreeBSD in almost 2 years, and have
> little interest in returning to it...

Greetings,
Torsten
